item.title: WATCH: Small plane crashes in Phoenix neighborhood
item.description: Officials say the plane took off from a nearby airport before experiencing a mechanical issue and attempting to return before it slammed into two home...

item.title: WATCH: 'Brady Bunch' house designated as historical-cultural monument
item.description: The L.A. City Council designated the iconic home as a historical-cultural monument, protecting the beloved landmark from demolition.

item.title: Noem's testimony on contracts 'false,' Democratic senator claims
item.description: DHS Secretary Kristi Noem appeared on Wednesday in front of a House committee.

item.title: Iran live updates: US torpedo attack on Iran warship 'an atrocity' minister says
item.description: IDF airstrikes targeted "dozens" of sites connected to internal security forces.

item.title: US jobless claims filings unchanged from previous week at 213,000, layoffs remain low
item.description: The number of Americans applying for unemployment benefits last week was unchanged from the week before, a sign that layoffs remain at historically lo...
